return A(n)end,function(y,U)local A=Y(U)local F=function(F)return O(y,{F},U,A)end return F end,function(y,U)local A=Y(U)local F=function()return O(y,{},U,A)end return F end,function(y)S[y]=S[y]-(510401-510400)if 58414-58414==S[y]then S[y],H[y]=nil,nil end end,{},{},function(y,U)local A=Y(U)local F=function(F,g,f,o,n)return O(y,{F,g,f,o,n},U,A)end return F end,function()q=q+(951079-951078)S[q]=-437694-(-437695)return q end return(V(478818-(-1027764),{}))(A(n))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[U(827751+-872080)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
